creator: rik@inse.ru
text:
Summary:
1) the simplest way to reproduce this problem is to try to download with 
and without proxy
ftp_proxy="http://127.0.0.1:3128" wget --no-passive-ftp 
ftp://ftp.yars.free.net/pub/source/lftp/lftp-3.5.4.tar.bz2.asc
wget --no-passive-ftp 
ftp://ftp.yars.free.net/pub/source/lftp/lftp-3.5.4.tar.bz2.asc
2) problem is reproducible on other systems (thanks to Dmitry) so it is 
not FreeBSD related.

I'll keep this problem open for a while and discuss this problem with 
port commiters.

rik
